headline: MKTX Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Robust Commission Revenue Growth
summary: MarketAxess tops Q1 estimates as commission revenues and trading volumes surge across high-grade, EM and Eurobonds markets.

headline: LNC Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Rising Investment Income
summary: Lincoln National beats Q1 earnings estimates as higher investment income, strong annuity deposits and Life Insurance growth offset weaker premiums.

headline: The Hartford's Study: Amid Rising Cost Of Living, AI Emerging As Benefits Decision-Making Tool For Gen Z
summary: AI search tools are now a part of how of some U.S. workers are making employee benefits decisions, particularly as inflation is driving up the cost of living, according to the Future of Benefits Study...
